description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8 Docker image with stages install, test, build, deploy, and cleanup. In the install stage add an npm:install job that runs npm install and stores the node_modules directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a lint job that runs npm run lint and a test job that runs npm run test. In the deploy stage add a deploy_job that runs echo "deploy", is manual, and deploys to the production environment at https://example.com. In the cleanup stage add a cleanup_job that runs echo "cleanup" and always executes.
